channel.title: Torchfinder -- Lodes & Lanterns
channel.description: Content lookup for Shadowdark. Find adventures, supplements, and zines.

item.title: The Black Ballad -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: An afterlife campaign set in the realm of the Sunless Crossing, made for characters who have fallen in previous adventures. This edition redesigned for Shadowdark expands the system into epic-level play, and includes 17 new monsters.
item.author: Rick Heinz, Erik Frankhouse

item.title: RESERVOIR -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A "body horror puzzle dungeon." What do you know? Why, there's a huge mass of sentient meat bursting within the serpentine sewers below The Great City. Features 25+ keyed locations, colorful (and disgusting) illustrations, and environs that morph over time.
item.author: Cameron Maas

item.title: Righteous Vow Volume 4: Black Masts & Magic -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: The fourth volume of a five-adventure hexcrawl sea-farring pirate campaign. Features new rules for ships and their crews, and numerous classes, spells, magic items, and creatures.
item.author: Bill Harvat

item.title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 4: River of Night -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: The fourth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: cross the river into the menacing Tal-Yool Jungle. Adds the Ranger and Basilisk Warrior classes, a complete Druid spell list, a hexcrawl, and nine mini-adventures.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne, Baron de Ropp

item.title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 5: Dwellers in the Deep -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: The fifth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: explore Morzomotha, a grim region only for those who don't fear the Shadowdark. Adds the Delver and Wyrdling classes, a complete spell list for chaotic wizards, and the Goulish Library of Leng adventure.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 6: City of Masks -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: The sixth Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG: city-crawl through the perilous, fabled City of Masks. Adds the Bard and Duelist classes, spells for lawful wizards, and greatly expands carousing and downtime rules.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Shadowdark RPG: Core Spell Cards -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A deck of spell cards covering all 88 spells from the Shadowdark RPG core rules, one card per spell for easy reference at the table.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Shadowdark RPG: Expansion Spell Cards -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A deck of cards covering all 101 spells from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6, one card per spell for easy reference at the table.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Shadowdark RPG: Game Master's Guide to the Western Reaches -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Game Master's Guide to the Western Reaches, a digest-sized companion to the Shadowdark RPG core rules. Forming a massive campaign setting alongside the Player's Guide, they combine and expand all content from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6. It includes all hexcrawling keys from those zines, and features a full map of the Western Reaches, 16 regions (10 new), over 250 keyed locations, the monsters from Cursed Scrolls 1-6 and new ones, talent-learning mechanics from NPCs, sandbox options and advice, and a new kickoff adventure.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: Shadowdark RPG: Player's Guide to the Western Reaches -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Player's Guide to the Western Reaches, a digest-sized companion to the Shadowdark RPG core rules. Forming a massive campaign setting alongside the Game Master's Guide, they combine and expand all content from Cursed Scroll zines 1-6. The Player's Guide has all character options from those zines, and includes 18 classes, 8 ancestries (with the new half-elf and kobold), complete gear lists, all class spells listed by tier, lore for the nine major gods, new backgrounds and secrets tables, adventuring factions, and Reaches gossip.
item.author: Kelsey Dionne

item.title: The League of Dark Few -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A city-based mini-setting zine series centered around a secretive organization called the League of Dark Few, made up of string-pullers brokering influence. Includes a guidebook with contract generator, a zero-level gauntlet in dungeons underneath the Vulgar Manse, and a first-level adventure in the Crypt of the Forgotten Duke.
item.author: Anthony Zinni

item.title: Under the Shadow of Helfast Spire -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 64-page zine featuring the Coal Catacombs, a dungeon setting inspired by historical coal mining conditions. Introduces 4 new classes, 16 new monsters, 30 new magic items, hexcrawl wilderness sites, and rules for hazardous gases and uniquely adapted creatures.
item.author: Robert Mason (Bob World Builder)

item.title: 100 Hand-drawn Fantasy Ink Illustrations -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Gritty, all-original illustrations exemplary of the OSR vibe that are definitely appropriate for Shadowdark. Includes high-resolution TIFF raster files and even vectorized versions.
item.author: Tove L. J.

item.title: Call of the Black Star -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: "Simply crash the meteor within a short distance from your players' favorite town and let the orb do the rest!" A cosmic horror adventure set in the geometrically-intriguing Black Star Dungeon, filled with teamwork-based obstacles and the hazardous radiation of Eldritch Aether!
item.author: Patrick Neill (Patato, DM_Tricky)

item.title: Mice of Legend -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A highly-praised and unique saga of heroic mouse-people rewritten for Shadowdark. Includes an expansive campaign guide, three uncondensed adventures, over 25 full-color VTT-ready maps, loads of spells, mounts, and hawk taming. (Reese here, creator of Torchfinder. My wife - who has thus far turned down my requests to play Shadowdark - saw Mice of Legend while I was inputting it. She instantly changed her mind. How's that for a description?)
item.author: Paul Hoeffer

item.title: More Goblins! -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A supplement greatly expanding your goblin rolodex with variants described in the field notes of Meister Sunseri. Beware of the Goblin King Clan's taxation. And Flesh Sculptors, of course.
item.author: Bryan Gillispie

item.title: The Curse of Stoneshatter Tomb -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A second-level adventure designed for one-shots and conventions. Characters descend into a long-sealed dwarven mountain tomb and face the curse that has festered within it.
item.author: Jeff Mueller

item.title: The Spear of Horrendous Iron -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A dense regional adventure involving fervently-religious anarchists. Smorgasbords a faction-laden town of shifting alliances with a regional map and dungeon tied together by deliberately unbalanced encounters. Features 14 new monsters and six new magical items.
item.author: Samuel Taylor

item.title: Tower of Rime Light -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 32-page arctic hexcrawl set in the frozen wastes of Imjaroth. Introduces two new classes, a new psychic ancestry, an undead dragon, and the time-shifting Accursed.
item.author: Jay Scott

item.title: Demidirge: Fanged Funnel -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: You are a tunneler who must conspire to escape the watchful and subterranean acid sea blistering underneath a liminal cathedral. Avoiding the awareness of a Queen and the wraith-priests is advised, while exploiting "contraband fossils" and decaying tools.
item.author: Shane Walshe

item.title: Rock & Roar! -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A neon and thunder bestiary of 50+ monsters inspired from classic rock, pop, and metal song titles and band names. Each monster gets its own illustrated page with backstory, stats, and option charts. Appendices include thematic maps, magic items, mini-adventures, and other stuff.
item.author: Joe Wetzel, Andrew Shields

item.title: Dungeon Death: 16-bit Rules -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A strange cartridge launches you into a world with 16-bit video game rules drawing inspiration from Jumanji, Tron, manga, and LitRPGs. Go back to the 90s by retaking The Crystal of Harmony from P'ork, and be reminded of how old you are.
item.author: Joshua Yoder (Crimson Adder)

item.title: Outcast Unseelie and the Ooze Between -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A highly-interconnected and two-level puzzle dungeon defined by mysterious slime and fey attitude. Includes fairy trinkets, ooze-themed monsters, and several enigmatic NPCs.
item.author: Jesse Winter

item.title: Soulblight - Hamartia -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 292-page Soulblight expansion set on the Mediterranean-inspired Islands of Hamartis, where players are delivered to a penal colony by royal decree. Echoes of the Reconquista pervade the multiple paths forward — escape, rebellion, or piracy — playing out across a hexcrawl and dungeon of over 50 rooms, black powder weaponry, and over 100 new monsters.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Mudbones -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Danger awaits in the multi-level, mud-buried temple of a dead god stirring to life anew. Filled with traps, secret doors, water features, and new monsters including the "mudbones."
item.author: Scott Craig

item.title: Forest Adventures -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A hex-based forest supplement made with the Hawkmoor setting in mind. It details Witchyflow Vale, which can expand any setting or even systems other than Shadowdark. Includes the Oozeling ancestry, the Hermit class, 20 new spells, 15 new creatures, and 25 encounter-populated hexes with separate maps for GMs and players.
item.author: James Mishler, Jodi Moran-Mishler

item.title: Against the Dark 3: Legend of the Archfiend -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A free hexcrawl adventure featuring four elemental tombs, a wilderness region, and a climactic Dark Castle. A relic hunt against lethal traps and an archfiend.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright (Signals From Beyond)

item.title: Soulblight - Forever Hold Your Peace -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 3rd-to-5th level adventure set in the temple of the Sandreaver, goddess of the Scorpionfolk. The party infiltrates the sacred hall during a wedding between the Worm-King and Reaving Goddess, contending with over 20 rooms of blood rituals, accursed jewels, and the uninviting attendants.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen

item.title: Soulblight - Swords and Sorceries -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A grand anthology of adventures indulging the breadth of the Soulblight campaign setting, taking parties across Lothorian's varied environments, from jungle temples and desert ruins to planar expeditions and underworld oddities across the seven realms. Nerve-racking escape sequences, necromancy, and wereleopards included.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen, Taylor Seely-Wright (Signals From Beyond)

item.title: Soulblight - The First Cycle -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 240-page Soulblight expansion set in the prehistoric Nameless Valleys, long before the sprawling kingdoms of Lothorian took shape. Covers an early bronze-age world of tribal peoples in a hexcrawl format, including the Amber Hold dungeon, over 100 new monsters, period-appropriate gear, and rules for overland travel and magical rites. Watch out for giants and beasts from the stars.
item.author: Laurin David Weggen, Taylor Seely-Wright (Signals From Beyond)

item.title: Temple of the Green Devil -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A competitive and deadly tournament module in which adventurers plunder a jungle temple during a solar eclipse, each group sabotaging the other with summoned monsters, traps, and curses. Available in a free edition (with 80s nostalgia) and a paid deluxe edition. Includes 14 new monsters, optional single-team rules, a winner's certificate, and six play-ready characters.
item.author: Sersa Victory

item.title: A Very Merry Shadowe'en -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Beholden to squabbling hags, the Island of Hands hauls itself each equinox with multitudes of spindly limbs across the dark. Each hag masquerades as an innocent maiden. When the island's grasping phalanges pluck the party, placing them in a fog-choked wood at its crown, they must circumvent being remade by the crones' rituals.
item.author: A. Denbigh Strickland

item.title: Ascension of the Serpent Queen -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: To find a prince whose caravan had been ambushed on the way to a diplomatic summit, the party must venture forth into the den of a fanatical cabal and their serpent queen. Survival depends upon slipping past traps and lurking horrors with time to spare for preventing an unspeakable ritual. 1st-level characters must stop the queen from further empowering herself in this adventure that includes tokens and portrait art.
item.author: Jay Rutley

item.title: Caverns of Carnage -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Grimhaven and its subterranean tunnels have set the greedy in motion, yet the jungles are stalked by carving "cultists, cannibals, and a ravenous giant panther." Hooded zealots draped in feather-and-bone jewelry studded with gemstone chips (worth prying from a corpse) stand between 1st- to 3rd-level adventurers and far greater treasures.
item.author: Scott Swalwell

item.title: Choice of Life -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Opportunity arises for 3rd- to 4th-level characters when the daughter of a werewolf family ferries them through a portal to the far side of the moon... but later betrays her own kin. The fleaborn are now intent on flushing the bloodline out from their peaceful existence in Hothers Valley. Features new monsters such as the "Worm that Walks," a new class, and magical gear.
item.author: Erik Frankhouse

item.title: Dacian Draco -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Splicing wolves with dragons means a sojourn to the moon, where no torch nor magic will hold sway over the shadows. There are whispers that the Wolf Cult has returned in the accompanying 16-page A5 booklet, detailing a dungeon, compact adventuring area, and a new class called the Lone Wolf.
item.author: Mal Star

item.title: Detour to the City of Torment -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Welcome to Torment, a city betwixt life and death at the liminal periphery of Chronospace, its gnarled and knotted streets crossing dimensions, and their myriad sub-dimensional layers, to the most twisted eldritch beings in the Kosmos. Sheer bravery or madness is the only necessary qualification for those wishing to participate in this sandbox adventure.
item.author: Fevery Beastcraft

item.title: Enigma of the Eryx Estate -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: 1st- to 3rd-level characters must solve a murder mystery of layered and experience-rewarding sub-mysteries by the hush of night. Otherwise, it might be the end of the party. A minimal-prep scenario set in a reclaimed roadside inn that once belonged to the Eryx family. Can the party help merchant Robert E. Wardlove save his distressed daughter?
item.author: Pakkanen

item.title: Eternal Fate in the Penthouse -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: The faint aroma of cinnamon wafts through a corrupted manor where an agent of seduction, generated with a convenient table, has lured a confidant to the party. Will they rescue their ally, or lose themselves in the deep yellow fog that curls through the sinuous halls?
item.author: LaffRaff

item.title: Gristle & Vine: The Tomb of ... -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: "Beware the gargoyles" warns the archivist, just after submitting a proposal to the party. In exchange for razing the remnants of the Lost Ones at a fresh dig site led by Jinjer Potts, there will be wealth beyond imagining in this one-shot.
item.author: Nick Campbell

item.title: House of the Candle Maker -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Is there truth to the whispers that an apparition haunts the halls of the boarded-up mansion of the late Gray B'Moth, candlemaker and enigma? And what secrets might his candles still hold? Where is his fortune hidden within?
item.author: AngelsDidSay

item.title: Isle of the Evil Eye -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: After a sea-ringed garrison for viperians was stricken by a conniving devil, its former leader Sesnu has been remade in the form of a serpent. He loyally slithers along the halls, guarding riches and his master in this 1st- to 4th-level adventure.
item.author: Itch_Rokas

item.title: Lord of Discord -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A 3rd-level hexcrawl in which the party must go to the isle of Skelda to hush a melody. Otherwise, it will lure more unsuspecting souls into the Lord of Discord's unbeatable test to find his successor. Sent by the King's Council to end this annual madness, the party must acquire four songs of the ancient Sea Elves to unlock a warded entryway to the Lord's domain.
item.author: Anzelak

item.title: Marrow -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A retro-future descent into the undersea kingdom of Unlantis where a dormant wreck of a bio-machine notably contains untapped "marrow" fluid. The party, preferably four to six 3rd-level characters, must extract as much as possible before the "Vengeance" stirs back to life. Based on "Vengeance in Her Bones" by Malcolm Jameson.
item.author: Meaghan J

item.title: Pleasures of the Dream Palace -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: A factional powerkeg for 3rd- to 5th-level characters to ignite within the Glassform Palace... that may just break the fourth wall. Features otherworldly intrigue wherein sinister demonic entanglements, a family in turmoil, and a "superstructure built entirely of thought" push forward an open-ended narrative that rewards strategic decision-making.
item.author: Taylor Seely-Wright (Signals From Beyond)

item.title: Sunfall over Swept Sands -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: An isolated town offers reprieve from the gargoyles swooping over the shifting sands of this compact hexcrawl. At least, it did until the bridge to it collapsed. Can the party help the stranded merchants and travellers? There are fourteen points of interest to captivate players, along with hand-illustrated maps specifically for them and the GM.
item.author: Fireside Tales

item.title: Temple of The Feathered Serpent -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Stylized and inspired by Mesoamerica and its vibrant frescos, this adventure features a ziggurat that grinds out of the sands upon an astronomical conjunction that only occurs once per 55 years. The party must deal with competing treasure hunters and the Black Jaguar that lurks within the trapped interior if they want to recover the Double Chalice, a relic for reversing death. Well, if the undead manifestation of Quetzalcoatl lets them.
item.author: Aeo-winkler

item.title: The Awful AMBER DOOM -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: An ode to the old school in which the City Beneath the Sea upraises out of its oceanic entombment during a once-in-a-century lunar solstice. 3rd-level adventurers must race along coral-enshrouded mazes of driftwood, crawling with homunculytes and other fiends, to stop the Corpse-Master before he augments his power by an order of magnitude. Includes the whip-wielding Explorer class.
item.author: Reverse Ettin Games

item.title: The Chimera's Gift -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: Minds surrendered to the sweltering humidity of an island jungle, a cult of naturalists seal themselves within a temple, honing their ingenuity in a shared fever dream. 2nd- to 3rd-level characters breach the structure, discovering the products of prolonged, unmitigated derangement. There are treasures to come away with, including a new magic item, but only if the party can maintain their own sanity through this 31-room dungeon accompanied by seven precision-engineered monsters.
item.author: David Northcutt

item.title: The Devil is in The Details -- Lodes & Lanterns
item.description: In this one-shot, the members of the party hail from one or more family farms in Boreton. Furthermore, they shall each roleplay as the uniquely mediocre Roustabout class created by Michael Putlack (Night Noon Games) and Kelsey Dionne (The Arcane Library). The party must defend their land against the consequences of a deal with a devil: a magical varmint that might just unravel the secrets held by local farmers.
item.author: Arthur Marques
